pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting task.json description, export_result.sh paths, and verifier.py logic.
Verified by inspecting task.json description, export_result.sh paths, and verifier.py logic.
Verified via setup_task.sh which dynamically downloads NCBI NM_000207.3 to this specific location.

Verified against verifier.py logic, which expects feature count additions to exceed baseline thresholds (len(enzyme_matches) >= 5 or feature_count > 20) corresponding to at least 10+ new enzyme annotations for full credit.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real Homo sapiens insulin (INS) mRNA transcript (NCBI NM_000207.3) downloaded dynamically to /home/ga/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb. The target output files are /home/ga/UGENE_Data/results/insulin_restriction_annotated.gb and /home/ga/UGENE_Data/results/cloning_strategy_report.txt, precisely matching the verifier scripts. The sequence features a real CDS spanning positions 60-392.
